note: sost-transactions.html section 03 (Sending Capsule Transactions) grew two detailed reference blocks. (1) 'Picking the right RPC endpoint' explains the LOCAL NODE / WEBSITE READ ONLY / WEBSITE AUTH matrix in the same wording the web wallet's ? panel uses, plus the operator self-test curl recipe (must return -22 TX decode, not -401, on both http://127.0.0.1:18232 and /rpc). (2) 'Capsule types (SCPv1)' replaces the old 4-row summary with a per-type expandable card for each of the seven type codes (0x01 OPEN_NOTE_INLINE LIVE, 0x02 SEALED_NOTE_INLINE DEFERRED, 0x03 DOC_REF_OPEN LIVE, 0x04 DOC_REF_SEALED DEFERRED, 0x05 TEMPLATE_FIELDS_OPEN LIVE, 0x06 TEMPLATE_FIELDS_SEALED DEFERRED, 0x07 CERT_INSTRUCTION LIVE), each with its body layout, size limits, the CLI command, and the web-wallet entry point. The full TemplateId enum (invoice_v1, contract_ref_v1, payment_receipt_v1, transfer_instruction_v1, escrow_note_v1, compliance_record_v1, warranty_record_v1, shipment_record_v1, gold_cert_note_v1, custom_kv_v1) is now visible inline. Force-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
